name: Dumbbell Bench Press
setup: Lie on flat bench with dumbbells on thighs
Kick dumbbells up to starting position using leg drive
Palms facing forward, dumbbells at shoulders
execution: Lower dumbbells to sides of chest with controlled tempo
Elbows at ~75 degrees, stop when upper arms parallel to floor
Drive dumbbells up and together (don't clang at top)
common_mistakes: Dumbbells too far forward at bottom
cues: Think 'barn door' on the way down (elbows open wide)
Squeeze chest at top of movement
Keep wrists neutral, not bent back
advantages: Greater range of motion than barbell
